reviews.comment:
Pesima atención,el encargado "asi se autodenomino" no me permitió inflar una pelota...despues de haber llenado mi tanque y 2 amigos mas,poco tacto con el turista!....por este tipo de personas es que muchos no volvemos a Necochea.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. The attendant, "as he called himself," wouldn't let me inflate a ball...after I and two other friends had filled up the tank. He's very tactless with tourists! It's because of people like this that many of us don't return to Necochea.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8983193634567568949/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5cmRTc3pRRRAB

Excelente atención, tienen lavadero de autos con turno y un café donde podes esperar a que tu auto esté listo. Precios razonables.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. They have a car wash with appointments and a café where you can wait for your car to be ready. Reasonable prices.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar, muy cuidado. Bárbaro los playeros, en atención y paciencia, en el uso de las nuevas técnicas...
Todo el mundo con barbijo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, very well maintained. The beach attendants were fantastic, attentive and patient, and they were very proficient with the new techniques... Everyone was wearing a mask.
